title: Sport vs Champions
author: Sport vs Champions
description: I'm retired from the United States Air Force and love boxing.  I've boxed as an amateur and spent copious amounts of time in boxing gyms around the world.  I created this channel to provide a non-biased perspective on what's going on in boxing and on occasion other sports.  Like I've always heard in boxing gyms, you either find a way to win or you find a way to lose.  Please subscribe and let's find a way to win together.
